## Checklist

- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes in `extensions/ritemark/`
- [ ] `./scripts/apply-patches.sh --dry-run` shows all patches as "Already applied"
- [ ] Changes are in `extensions/ritemark/` (not direct `vscode/` edits)
- [ ] No telemetry, tracking, or cloud dependencies added
- [ ] Commit(s) are signed off (`git commit -s`) per DCO
